title: Claude Fable 5 & Apple’s NVIDIA deal
summary: A podcast episode featuring IBM Technology experts debating whether Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 justifies the hype, analyzing its tier routing system. The hosts also discuss Apple's shift away from on-device AI toward NVIDIA cloud compute at WWDC 2026, and debate whether AI models can reliably detect sarcasm using multimodal inputs.
writeup: This IBM Technology podcast episode debates whether Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 lives up to its hype, with attention to its tier routing system and the role of mixture-of-experts routing. The hosts cover Apple's WWDC 2026 shift away from on-device AI toward NVIDIA cloud compute, a notable reversal for a company that emphasized local processing. The episode also examines whether AI models can reliably detect sarcasm through multimodal inputs.
